ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AMZN, MSFT) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the stock information was updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on that date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient */,
  "source" TEXT /* Data source of the price entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the price information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the portfolio was updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the portfolio is public */,
  "performance" REAL /* Overall performance of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the portfolio stock entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the user account was updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for programmatic access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value of the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the alert was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert check (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_history" (
  "alert_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert history entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "trigger_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert when triggered (e.g., triggered, not triggered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the news article was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., RSI, Bollinger Bands) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Data source of the indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the indicator information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
